image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Photoreceptors convert photons into neural signals your brain turns into vision.
Context visual: But how does this incredible transformation happen?
Escalation visual: Inside your retina, two main types of photoreceptors, rods and cones, play key roles.
Evidence visual: Rods help us see in low light, while cones allow us to perceive color.
Payoff visual: This delicate process sends signals to your brain, creating the vivid world you experience.
Cta visual: Curious about more secrets of your body? Follow for more fascinating insights!
